short_summary: Iran deal near, SpaceX IPO, World Cup
rationale: The US is directly involved in Iran peace negotiations, making a potential deal highly relevant domestically; SpaceX's stock debut affects US financial markets; the World Cup hosted in the US generates significant domestic economic and social activity.

top_events.title: Iran war: US and Tehran signal peace deal within reach; Hormuz reopening possible
top_events.summary: The US is the central broker in Iran peace talks; a deal would lower oil prices, reduce military commitments, and be a major domestic political win — directly affecting American consumers and foreign policy.

top_events.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX debuts on stock market
top_events.summary: SpaceX's public market debut is a major US financial market event; Musk's wealth and influence over US policy (DOGE, government contracts) make this relevant to American investors and political watchers.

top_events.title: Mother sues OpenAI after daughter's death linked to ChatGPT use
top_events.summary: A high-profile US lawsuit against OpenAI over AI safety could accelerate domestic AI regulation debates, affecting the tech sector and broader policy landscape for American consumers and businesses.
